title: Slab To Block
description: This mod lets you convert slabs back into full blocks via simple crafting recipes.
body:
# 🧱 Slab to Block

### 🔹 What is this mod about?

**Slab to Block** is a lightweight and helpful mod that lets you **convert slab blocks back into full blocks** using simple crafting recipes.

Whether you're playing survival or building elaborate structures, this mod helps you make the most out of your resources and keep your builds clean and consistent.

***

### 🔧 Supported Mods

This mod supports more than just vanilla blocks!

✅ **Create Mod**

> Full compatibility with slab processing.

🔜 **More mod support coming soon**

> Based on community feedback and popular demand.

***

### 🖼️ Preview
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/L_V2_vEQCkg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> ![Oak Slab to Oak Planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77bc4932830db200491300b563a519ba6107438e.png)![Waxed Copper Tile Slab to Waxed Copper Tiles (mod create)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/536f74308b482828b693e20d1d77b2556659c6f9.png)

***

### 🌐 Supported Languages

This mod is translated into the following languages:

*   🇨🇿 Czech (`cs_cz`)
*   🇩🇪 German (`de_de`)
*   🇺🇸 English (`en_us`)
*   🇪🇸 Spanish (`es_es`)
*   🇫🇷 French (`fr_fr`)
*   🇭🇺 Hungarian (`hu_hu`)
*   🇮🇹 Italian (`it_it`)
*   🇯🇵 Japanese (`ja_jp`)
*   🇵🇱 Polish (`pl_pl`)
*   🇧🇷 Portuguese - Brazil (`pt_br`)
*   🇷🇺 Russian (`ru_ru`)
*   🇸🇰 Slovak (`sk_sk`)
*   🇺🇦 Ukrainian (`uk_ua`)
